purpose: Applications required or commonly used by the Windows 11 MG PBX virtual machine

required.name: Python 3.11
required.reason: Compatibility with the existing MG PBX Python project

required.name: Node.js LTS
required.reason: PBX web interface and supporting tools

required.name: 7-Zip
required.reason: Private deployment bundle extraction and creation

required.name: Microsoft Visual C++ 2015-2022 Runtime x64
required.reason: Native runtime used by Python, Node, and PBX dependencies

required.name: Microsoft Edge WebView2 Runtime
required.reason: Embedded PBX and Home Assistant interface support
